title: Second NMU student dies after Victoria Bay drowning
description: NATIONAL NEWS – A student from Nelson...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS – A student from Nelson Mandela University’s (NMU) George campus who had been hospitalised following a drowning incident at Victoria Bay on Friday 31 October, has died.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS – A student from Nelson Mandela University’s (NMU) George campus who had been hospitalised following a drowning incident at Victoria Bay on Friday 31 October, has died."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Her fellow student drowned at the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, emergency services were called to Victoria Bay on Friday afternoon after two women disappeared underwater.","html":"According to Southern Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Chris Spies, emergency services were called to Victoria Bay on Friday afternoon after two women disappeared underwater."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Read more on the George Herald"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Second NMU student dies after Victoria Bay drowning
